overall.description: A cinematic journey through a cyberpunk city's canal district during golden hour, transitioning to a foggy night scene with a character walking through neon-lit streets. The footage showcases futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric lighting characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canal with elevated highways and neon advertisements

events.description: camera turns right along the canal, revealing the red neon building and drainage pipes
camera faces directly into the setting sun, creating intense glare and golden reflections on the water
passing the large advertisement billboard and turning toward the industrial district with smokestacks

agents.ego_description: navigating a small watercraft through the canal, observing the cyberpunk cityscape and neon signage

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with green railings spanning the canal
multiple colorful holographic advertisements on building facades
weathered concrete walls lining the canal with metal railings
multi-story building with prominent red neon signage
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars
tall digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
tall chimneys emitting white smoke into the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle water-level view navigating through a cyberpunk canal during golden hour. The camera moves past concrete embankments beneath an elevated highway overpass, turning to reveal futuristic skyscrapers and high-voltage towers silhouetted against the setting sun. Neon holographic advertisements reflect off the water's surface as the craft continues through the industrial waterfront district.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial intersection with hotel and shops

events.description: abrupt transition from canal to street level, changing from day to night with foggy atmosphere
character steps onto the yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking across a wet neon-lit crosswalk at night, heading toward the commercial district

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera on the left sidewalk, heading away from the intersection

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading HOTEL with Japanese characters above
yellow painted stripes on the asphalt marking pedestrian crossing
dark reflective street surface showing neon light reflections
tall pole with traffic signals and yellow-black striped bollards
tall structure with multiple illuminated billboards and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a foggy night at street level, following a character crossing a neon-lit intersection. A prominent pink HOTEL sign glows on the left while the character walks across yellow crosswalk stripes. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings, and sparse pedestrian traffic moves through the cyberpunk commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sun-drenched industrial waterway into a foggy, neon-lit urban intersection at night. It begins with a low-angle perspective gliding through a cyberpunk canal during golden hour, passing concrete embankments and an elevated highway overpass. As the camera moves forward, futuristic skyscrapers and high-voltage towers emerge against the setting sun, with holographic advertisements shimmering on the water's surface. The environment then shifts abruptly from the waterfront to a misty street level, where the camera follows a character crossing yellow stripes on wet asphalt. Finally, the scene settles into a commercial district defined by the glow of a prominent pink hotel sign and colorful neon reflections mirroring the surrounding city architecture.
